title: Brendan O'Hara MP questions the Foreign Secretary over the situation in Gaza | Brendan O'Hara MP
meta_description: Tuesday 9th January 2024 was the first opportunity for the Foreign Affairs Select Committee to question the new Foreign Secretary David Cameron, on the situation in Gaza. You can see here the full exchange I had when I questioned him on whether he thought Israel had broken International Humanitarian law.
headings: h2: Brendan O’Hara MP questions the Foreign Secretary over the situation in Gaza
h3: Call for a ceasefire in Gaza – 14th November
h3: SNP urges Cameron to be ‘on right side of history’ after ICJ’s Israel ruling
text_excerpt: Brendan O'Hara MP questions the Foreign Secretary over the situation in Gaza | Brendan O'Hara MP Skip to content Menu Home News About Contact Newsletter Brendan O’Hara MP questions the Foreign Secretary over the situation in Gaza Published: 11 January 2024 Categories: News 11 January 2024 11 January 2024 Tuesday 9th January 2024 was the first opportunity for the Foreign Affairs Select Committee to question the new Foreign Secretary David Cameron, on the situation in Gaza. You can see here the full exchange I had when I questioned him on whether he thought Israel had broken International Humanitarian law.
